title: The Chronicles of Aevermore
tone: Dark, literary, atmospheric. Think Ursula Le Guin meets Patrick Rothfuss.
setting: The world of Aevermore — a continent recovering from a magical cataclysm called The Accord, 40 years prior. Magic is rare and distrusted. Ancient structures still hum with old power.
worldRules: Magic is not cast — it is found. Old places hold it.
The Accord sealed most magical sites. Some seals are weakening.
No one alive remembers the world before The Accord clearly.

characters.name: Sable Ashveil
characters.appearance: Tall, dark-skinned, close-cropped silver-streaked hair (premature, stress-related). Wears practical traveling clothes, always carries a shuttered lantern and a small journal.
characters.personality: Methodical, quietly brave, deeply curious. Doesn't trust easily. Has a dry humor she rarely deploys.
characters.motivation: Searching for proof that The Accord was a lie — that the sealing of magic was a political act, not a necessity.
characters.imagePrompt: tall dark-skinned woman with short silver-streaked hair, wearing dark traveling cloak, holding a lantern, fantasy illustration, muted earth tones, candlelight

characters.name: The Warden
characters.appearance: Appears at roughly human height but wrapped in animate shadow. Two pale luminous points for eyes. No clear face.
characters.personality: Deliberate, cryptic, oddly courteous. Speaks in statements that sound like questions.
characters.motivation: Unknown. Appears to be guarding something — or waiting for something.
characters.imagePrompt: shadowy figure wrapped in animate darkness, two pale glowing eyes, standing in ruined stone tower, fantasy illustration, dark atmospheric, candlelight

characters.name: Lirenne
characters.role: Supporting — mentioned but not yet seen
characters.appearance: Redheaded, freckled, always warm-dressed. Former cartographer.
characters.personality: Practical optimist. The person Sable calls when she needs someone grounded.
characters.motivation: Helping Sable out of loyalty. Has her own doubts about The Accord.
characters.imagePrompt: redheaded freckled woman in warm layered clothing, carrying maps and survey tools, fantasy illustration, warm tones

plotOutline.act1: Days 1–60: Sable discovers the ember and makes a pact with The Warden to seek the three Accord Stones.
plotOutline.act2: Days 61–270: The journey. Each Accord Stone is in a different region. Each reveals a piece of the truth about The Accord. Lirenne joins in day 45.
plotOutline.act3: Days 271–365: The truth is worse than Sable expected. The choice: expose it and destabilize the world, or protect the lie.

narrativeStyle: Third-person limited, past tense. Sable's POV only. Lyrical but never flowery. Concrete sensory detail. Dialogue is sparse but loaded.
rollingSummary: Sable Ashveil, a researcher, has climbed the ruined tower of Morthis and found the legendary ember — a flame burning since before The Accord. She encountered The Warden, a shadow-creature guarding the tower, who asked whether she came from patience or urgency.
